protocol: ensemble 2xOpus + 2xCodex(gpt-5.5 xhigh) blind, arbiter aggregation, half-anchor round-2, verification layer passed

items.title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 0bps at their July 2026 meeting? (Fed maintains rate)
items.rationale: Core: CME FedWatch (fed-funds futures, the authoritative FOMC source) implies ~81% hold on Jul 29, so Kalshi's 0.90 'maintain' is ~9pts too high (retail status-quo/favorite overpricing) -> NO edge. Main risk: hawkish backdrop (Warsh 'inflation too high', core PCE 3.4%, 6 officials want two hikes) means the ~19% move is HIKE-side and could actually fire, resolving NO for us anyway is fine but a July hold is still the modal outcome; also futures vs Kalshi gap could close before close. Divergence: none - all four estimators landed at 0.80 (family div 0.00), verification confirmed rather than invalidated the blind, so half-anchor toward 0.90 was not taken.

items.title: Will Donald J. Trump attend The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final?
items.rationale: Core: White House confirmed to NBC it is 'holding' the Jul 19 final on Trump's schedule and FIFA granted him an unprecedented trophy-presentation role, so attendance is strongly signaled and resolution is generous (any brief appearance / self-posted social counts). Main risk: only real downside is a health/security/geopolitical shock in the ~2 weeks before the final. Divergence: small (family div 0.035) - Codex slightly lower on generic 2-3 week cancellation base rate; blind consensus ~0.92 vs market 0.88, half-anchor leaves finals near 0.90-0.935.

items.title: Will Kash Patel leave as FBI Director before Aug 1, 2026?
items.rationale: Core: Patel is actively serving (Iowa visit this week, vowed World Cup security), president-backed, no resignation/removal or Trump signal of intent, and the ~27-day window plus 'permanent departure only' wording make YES at 0.09 look rich -> mild NO lean. Main risk: live controversies (late STOCK-Act disclosure of $100k-$250k MSTR buy, alcohol/absence allegations he denies+litigates) leave a small tail for a shock resignation. Divergence: small (family div 0.015); blind consensus ~0.043 vs market 0.09, edge is thin so engine threshold likely governs.
